headline: Price Prediction: Can DTE Energy Hit $200 Before 2027?
summary: Our DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) call is constructive heading into the back half of 2026. The Detroit-based utility is in the middle of a generational capital cycle, with hyperscale data center demand reshaping the long-term earnings trajectory. The 24/7 Wall St. price target for DTE Energy is $157.53, implying 11.44% upside from $141.35. We rate shares ... Price Prediction: Can DTE Energy Hit $200 Before 2027?

headline: DTE Energy Offers Steady Growth Prospects Amid Data Center Boom
summary: In today's energy landscape, many utility companies have quietly become growth stories — and DTE Energy stock is no exception.

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on DTE Energy Stock?
summary: DTE Energy has underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
